title: Grensdalur
summary:
Grensdalur (Icelandic pronunciation: [ˈkrɛnsˌtaːlʏr̥] ) is a central volcanic vent and mountain of the Hengill volcanic system in Iceland. The elevation is about 497 m (1631 ft). Its position is 64.02°N 21.17°W.
It was active during Pleistocene.
text:
Grensdalur (Icelandic pronunciation: [ˈkrɛnsˌtaːlʏr̥] ) is a central volcanic vent and mountain of the Hengill volcanic system in Iceland. The elevation is about 497 m (1631 ft). Its position is 64.02°N 21.17°W.
It was active during Pleistocene.
